meta.title: Joint Injections — PRP, Hyaluronic Acid & More | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Joint injections as a conservative alternative to surgery: PRP, hyaluronic acid, Orthokine and steroids — with Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, orthopedic specialist with 37 years of experience. Maccabi clinics.

prpHyaluronicCombined.metaTitle: Combined PRP + Hyaluronic Acid Injection | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
prpHyaluronicCombined.metaDescription: The combined growth-factor injection — PRP and hyaluronic acid together: the therapeutic rationale, who the combination suits and how the treatment is performed.

prp.metaTitle: PRP Injections — Platelet-Rich Plasma | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
prp.metaDescription: PRP injections for joints and tendons: how platelet-rich plasma supports healing, what the treatment actually looks like and what is realistic to expect.

orthokine.metaTitle: Orthokine Therapy — Autologous Serum | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
orthokine.metaDescription: Orthokine therapy: serum enriched with anti-inflammatory proteins from your own blood, in a series of injections for joint wear and chronic inflammation.

hyaluronicAcid.metaTitle: Hyaluronic Acid Joint Injection | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
hyaluronicAcid.metaDescription: Hyaluronic acid injection: re-lubricating a worn joint, relieving arthrosis pain and improving movement — when the treatment is appropriate and what to expect.

steroid.metaTitle: Steroid (Cortisone) Joint Injection | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
steroid.metaDescription: Steroid joint injection: fast relief of painful inflammation, when it is the right choice — and why limiting the frequency of injections matters.

insuranceForms.metaTitle: Insurance Claim Forms & Paperwork | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
insuranceForms.metaDescription: Which medical documents you will receive from the clinic and how to submit a claim to your insurer or Maccabi — a practical guide for the patient.

selfPhysiotherapy.metaDescription: Principles of safe home exercise before and after joint injections: the pain rule, gradual progression and consistency — how to get the most out of the treatment.

prpHyaluronicCombined.title: Combined Injection — PRP + Hyaluronic Acid
prpHyaluronicCombined.description: The combined growth-factor injection: biological support for healing plus joint lubrication — in a single treatment.

prp.description: Platelet-rich plasma from your own blood — growth factors that support the healing of joints and tendons.

orthokine.description: Autologous serum enriched with anti-inflammatory proteins — a series of injections for joint wear and chronic inflammation.

hyaluronicAcid.title: Hyaluronic Acid
hyaluronicAcid.description: "Oil for the joint" — renewed lubrication that reduces friction and pain and improves movement in cartilage wear.

steroid.title: Steroid (Cortisone) Injection
steroid.description: The fastest relief for painful inflammation — used judiciously and at a sensible frequency.
